zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilda de Lucy於1136年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Richard de Lucy48歲，母親Rohese de Boulogne47歲。她於大約1152年與Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow在英國艾可蕾托 登莫福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1243年在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 登莫福享年107歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 登莫福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilda de Lucy于1136年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Richard de Lucy48岁，母亲Rohese de Boulogne47岁。她于大约1152年与Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow在英国艾可蕾托 登莫福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1243年在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 登莫福享年107岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 登莫福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilda de Lucy was born in 1136, in Norfolk, England, her father, Richard de Lucy, was 48 and her mother, Rohese de Boulogne, was 47. She married Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow about 1152, in Little Dunmow, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1243, in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 107, and was buried in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilda de Lucy est née en 1136, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lucy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Boulogne, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow environ 1152, à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1243, à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 107 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilda de Lucy 1136 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Lucy 48 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Boulogne 47. Sie hat um 1152 in Little Dunmow, Essex, England Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1243 im Alter von 107 Jahren in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilda de Lucy è nata il nel 1136 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Richard de Lucy, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Boulogne, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow circa 1152, nel Little Dunmow, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1243, nel Little Dunmow, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 107 anni, e fu sepolta a Little Dunmow, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Lucyが1136年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Richard de Lucyは48歳，母Rohese de Boulogneは47歳であった。約1152年にイギリスエセックスリットル ダンモウでWalter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1243年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ダンモウで107歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ダンモウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilda de Lucy(이)가 1136년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Lucy(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Boulogne(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1152년 영국 에세스 리틀 던모에서 Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 던모에서 107세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 던모에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilda de Lucy nasceu em 1136, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Lucy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Boulogne, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow aproximadamente 1152, em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1243, em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 107 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilda de Lucy родилась в 1136 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Lucy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Boulogne, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow около 1152 г. в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1243 г. в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 107 лет и была похоронена в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
